title: Gierem Vanilla Plus: Client Edition
description: Gierem’s client-side Vanilla+ modpack focused on performance, QoL and visual improvements without altering vanilla gameplay.
body:
Vanilla+ Client is a client-side modpack designed to enhance Minecraft’s core experience without changing its identity.

This pack focuses on delivering a smoother, cleaner and more responsive gameplay through carefully selected performance optimizations, visual improvements and quality-of-life features — all while staying true to vanilla mechanics.

Everything included has been curated to feel natural and cohesive, avoiding unnecessary complexity or gameplay alterations. The goal is simple: make Minecraft feel better, not different.

✦ Features
- Performance improvements for higher and more stable FPS
- Subtle visual enhancements and shader support
- Quality-of-life upgrades for a smoother user experience
- Fully client-side — works on any server

Whether you're starting a new world or joining a server, this modpack provides a refined Vanilla+ experience that just works.
